programs.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programs.desc: A waiter, is in love with the famous TV reporter Greeta Kapoor. After a man is murdered, Kapoor shows up at Raju's door to ask him some questions - it turns out that Raju served the dead man his last supper.

programs.title: Kyo Kii... Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
programs.desc: Raj is a lawyer who finds great success through his habit of lying. However, when his son wishes for his father to stop lying, Raj is magically forced to speak the truth and gets into trouble.

programs.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programs.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programs.title: Sarkar
programs.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.

programs.title: Mere Jeevan Saathi
programs.desc: An Indian pop star is coming to USA in order to sign a contract with one of the leading music studios. He finds himself heaving one night affair with the CEO of the company. Things go wrong when he find her in his flight back home.

programs.title: Parwana
programs.desc: Parwana, a thief, steals a bag containing explosives, which belongs to a dangerous man. The police then set out to hunt him as he is now labelled a terrorist.
